transcript.text:
I've just been noodle-slapped
[Soup all over her shirt]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat instant udon noodles
I've been here a long time ago
And I couldn't stop thinking about it
I remember this place being really crowded
Udon noodles made out of machines are cheap
Like 4,000 Won (~$3.50 USD)
I don't have much time, so let's head right in
[Instant Udon & Jjajang]
Hello
[We apologize in advance for the poor audio quality]
I'll just have a light meal today
I will order more as we go
Excuse me

2 orders of udon and 2 orders of jjajangmyun (black bean noodles), please
The portion is not bad at all
Bon appetit
Tasty
Really good
The noodles are very elastic
It splashes everywhere when I slurp
You can tell that the noodles were pulled from a machine
It's really good though
[You won't be able to hear what she is saying if you don't pay attention to the subtitles]
So yummy
There's a reason why this place is popular
Jjajangmyun!
That's a lot of noodles
Is this a large?
That's a lot

This tastes good too
You would expect something you'd get from a rest area
It's not like that at all
It has a very sweet & traditional style Delicious
I think it tastes even better than last time
It won't cut
It's sweeter than the traditional jjajangmyun
I think cubed radish kimchi will go well with this
Pork too
Not bad
It's big
Jjajangmyun is good too, but udon is really delicious
Oh no, the noodles are getting bloated
It just doubled in size It's a large
The noodles are too long
Let's cut it

You can cut the noodles like this if you don't have scissors
There's udon soup all over my face
Customers keep coming in
This place must be famous
They give you a lot of food
The soup is amazing
[Wait, is that!?]
[Customers: Is that Tzuyang!? Really? OMG! No way!]
I'm a fan!
That's crazy
She's so small
That's so cool
It's everywhere
Let's sprinkle some red pepper powder
I highly recommend putting some red pepper powder
It was just sweet at first, but now it's balanced out

Dining in for jjajangmyun is great
Since I'm just so used to getting it delivered
[4 bowls cleared]
Excuse me,
Can I get 1 udon and 1 jjajangmyun, please?
6 bowls!?
Where did that all go?
You have to starve 1 day prior
It's still impossible
Did you starve yourself?
No way~
We order 3 bowls for the 4 of us
[Photo time with the kids]
She looks like a kpop idol
Thank you
This isn't a large size, right?

It looks like it
[So much food in 1 bowl]
I gave her extra
Even the first bowl had a lot of food
That was the correct amount
I gave you extra for this order since you still looked hungry
How is she eating all of that?
I think I will call it a day after this
It's so good since it's warm
The noodles are long
I can't slurp that well because it splashes everywhere
I've just been noodle-slapped
Eating it like a spaghetti
I have to head out now because they're closing
These instant noodles are good in their own way It was delicious
I'm still not full yet, but Thanks everyone

Bill, please
That was a great meal [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
